overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking through a sun-drenched medieval European town with colorful stucco buildings, cobblestone streets, and flower-adorned balconies. The character progresses from narrow streets through archways into open plazas, passing various NPCs in period clothing.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow residential street with stone staircases

events.description: approaching and passing through large stone archway with red pillars

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through narrow cobblestone street following a woman in a blue dress

notable_agents.action: woman in blue dress walking ahead of the player toward the archway

entered.detail: large decorative stone archway with red and cream pillars marking the street entrance
tall residential building with red facade and balconies adorned with flowers
external stone stairs leading up to building entrance with potted plants
large stone planter with vibrant pink flowers on the right sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a narrow cobblestone street lined with historic red stucco buildings. The player character follows a woman in a blue dress toward a prominent stone archway with red pillars that marks the transition to the next area. Flower planters and hanging ivy add color to the stone architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: open town street with colorful merchant houses

events.description: passing a guard in green and red tunic standing on the right sidewalk

agents.ego_description: walking through the archway into a sunlit street lined with colorful townhouses

notable_agents.action: guard in green tunic and red pants standing watch on the sidewalk

entered.detail: bright orange stucco building with blue shuttered windows and flower boxes
colorful triangular pennant banners strung across the street overhead
decorative stone railing along the right sidewalk edge

segments.scene_description: Having passed through the archway, the scene opens into a wider sunlit street with colorful orange and red townhouses. Festival banners hang overhead while the player walks past a stationary guard. The architecture features decorative stone balustrades and vibrant flower boxes on windows.

scene_state.functional_zone: steep narrow street ascending toward sunlit plaza

events.description: entering strong backlight as the street ascends directly toward the sun, creating lens flare
walking uphill on steep cobblestone slope toward the clock tower

agents.ego_description: walking uphill on a steep cobblestone street toward a sunlit opening with a clock tower visible ahead

notable_agents.action: child sitting on stone steps to the right, watching the player pass

entered.detail: tall gothic clock tower with pointed spire visible at the top of the hill
tall stone retaining walls on both sides creating a corridor effect

segments.scene_description: The street narrows and steepens into an uphill climb flanked by high stone walls. Strong sunlight creates a dramatic backlight effect as the player ascends toward a distant clock tower. A child sits on steps to the right while festival banners hang overhead, marking the path toward the plaza above.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand plaza with central fountain and noble mansions

events.description: emerging from narrow street into large open plaza with fountain and column
turning left to walk around the central fountain area

agents.ego_description: walking into the open plaza and turning left to explore the area around the fountain

notable_agents.action: woman in green dress standing near the fountain basin

entered.detail: large circular stone fountain with water basin in the middle of the plaza
elaborate white stone mansion with arched windows and decorative stonework
tall decorative column monument standing near the fountain
distinctive red building with small turrets and crenellations

segments.scene_description: The player emerges into a grand open plaza dominated by a central fountain and a tall commemorative column. An ornate white noble mansion stands to the left while a distinctive red building with turrets is visible to the right. The camera turns left to circle the fountain, revealing more of the plaza's architecture and flowering trees.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered archway leading to market square

events.description: approaching and entering covered archway leading to market area
moving from bright sunlight into shaded archway with blue painted walls

agents.ego_description: walking toward and entering a covered market archway with visible stalls beyond

notable_agents.action: market vendor in blue clothing standing near the archway entrance

entered.detail: large arched passageway with blue painted walls leading to market square
walls painted in vibrant blue with decorative circular patterns
wooden market stalls with awnings visible through the archway
wooden boards with posted notices and papers on the right wall

segments.scene_description: The player approaches a covered archway with vibrant blue painted walls that serves as the entrance to a market square. Wooden market stalls are visible through the arch, and poster boards line the right wall. The lighting shifts to a softer diffused quality as the player enters the shaded passage, transitioning from the open plaza to the covered market area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a vibrant medieval town, transitioning from narrow residential streets into a grand open plaza and finally into a shaded market. It begins in a narrow cobblestone street lined with red stucco buildings and hanging ivy, following a woman in a blue dress through a prominent stone archway. As the camera passes through the arch, the scene opens into a wider sunlit street adorned with festival banners and colorful townhouses before narrowing again into a steep uphill climb toward a distant clock tower. The path then emerges into a grand open plaza featuring a central fountain, a commemorative column, and an ornate white mansion, with the camera circling the water to reveal flowering trees. Finally, the movement leads toward a covered archway with vibrant blue walls, where the bright sunlight shifts to a softer, diffused quality as the camera enters the shaded passage toward a market square.
